description: Current method: add positive-injection generator C_i at each load bus.
expected_benefit: Already implemented and easy to replay.
risk_or_gap: Can introduce artificial reactive support and OPF/PF mismatch.
recommended_next_step: Keep only as baseline diagnostic until Q mismatch and PF replay issues are resolved.

description: Use MATPOWER dispatchable-load convention or equivalent negative generator/load model.
expected_benefit: Reduces artificial voltage-control behavior from positive injection shed generators.
risk_or_gap: Requires careful MATPOWER cost/sign convention validation.
recommended_next_step: Recommended next AC formulation experiment if Q mismatch remains material.

description: Linear DC optimal load shedding with branch flow and generator P constraints.
expected_benefit: More numerically robust and useful for network feasibility screening.
risk_or_gap: Not equivalent to thesis AC OLS if the thesis uses AC constraints.
recommended_next_step: Recommended immediate feasibility preview for exported failures.

description: AC OPF with explicit soft penalties for branch/voltage violations.
expected_benefit: Distinguishes infeasibility from hard-constraint numerical failure.
risk_or_gap: Relaxed violations are diagnostic unless thesis uses soft constraints.
recommended_next_step: Use only after confirming hard constraints cause infeasibility.

description: Use DC-OLS to find a feasible shed pattern, then validate with AC PF/OPF.
expected_benefit: Provides a stable first-stage feasible point for AC validation.
risk_or_gap: Still approximate and may miss voltage/reactive infeasibility.
recommended_next_step: Consider after DC preview shows linear feasibility for failed AC cases.

description: Apply simple proportional shed to restore solvability, then polish with AC OPF.
expected_benefit: May improve AC numerical conditioning before optimization.
risk_or_gap: Can bias objective away from true min sum(C_i).
recommended_next_step: Use as a numerical conditioning diagnostic, not final OLS.
